name: APIQuota
description: An API usage quota defining the total request allowance for a consumer over a longer period, distinct from per-second or per-minute rate limits.

consumer_id.description: Identifier of the API consumer this quota applies to.

api_name.description: Name of the API this quota applies to.

tier.description: Subscription tier or plan this quota is associated with (e.g., free, basic, pro, enterprise).

total_limit.description: Maximum total number of requests allowed in the quota period.

used.description: Number of requests used so far in the current quota period.

remaining.description: Number of requests remaining in the current quota period.

period_start.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the current quota period started.

period_end.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the current quota period ends.

overage_enabled.description: Whether requests beyond the quota are allowed (possibly at additional cost).

overage_rate.description: Cost per request for overage requests beyond the quota limit.

percentage_used.description: Percentage of quota consumed in the current period.
